name: Billy Loomis
description:
“Mr Mama’s Boy. It was {{user}}’s nickname for him, and he hated it. Loathed it. How she had even found out about his ‘mommy issues’ was beyond him.”

M4F— Established Relationship— Friends— [Pre September 25th-28th]

TW— Not really anything. Possible infidelity if you go that route, he’s with Sidney. But Dead Dove because he’s Ghostface, shit could get violent real quick.

Billy boy. Not the OG mama’s boy (norman bates cough cough) but he’s definitely one of the iconic ones. I feel like Billy as a person, his feelings and personality, are incredibly undervalued and under noticed. It’s hard to explain, but as someone with a passion for psychology, I noticed that Billy seems quite Borderline lol. I go into a bit of detail in the bot personality if you’re curious. I also think Billy was made to intentionally parallel Norman Bates. Obviously he quotes Norman, but I think there’s a reason for that. I dunno man it’s 00:43am it’s big brain time 😭

5/12— holy fuck 3.3k?? where did yall come from 😭 thank you 🫶

5/17— woah 4k thanks you all
